title: Export update files (images)
excerpt:
Hi! 
I would like to export the files that are posted with updates. Currently it’s oinly exporting the message and not the files attached to the update.

posts.author: Michelvandersmissen (Michel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

I would like to export the files that are posted with updates. Currently it’s oinly exporting the message and not the files attached to the update.

posts.author: mrooney007 (M Rooney)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I would like to second this feature request. It is unwieldly to manually download files attached to an item or subitem one at a time.

Would like users to be able to use the Batch menu to select items/subitems and then have a “Export attached files to ZIP” menu option available.

-Melanie
